lines: Talmai turns a cracked plate toward the light and runs one thumbnail along the split.
"Boots today, armor tomorrow. Pride waits outside because it scratches the bench."

choices.label: Leave Talmai to the cracked plate

lines: "Leather and rivets. I can also mend field plate when the crack avoids a joint, or brace a Penitent cover without blessing it."
"Good repair begins with admitting which piece already failed."

choices.label: Ask whether he worked on Cassian
Leave Talmai to the cracked plate

lines: "He let me fit a hinge pin to the open service plate. Paid by cutting my dead brother’s name where rust would not take it."
"That was fairer than coin and harder to spend."

choices.label: Leave Talmai to the cracked plate
